name: Jeremy
description: A poor child of Lankshorn hired by Jack to tail Constable Wolder and report his movements.
notes: Paid by Jack to keep watch on the Constable's comings and goings.
Reported that the Constable left the constabulary and walked down the Ditchway into the woods on the night of the 25th.
Led the party to the clearing outside town where the Constable had met with the silver goblins.
